creator: bugs@jaguar.cs.nthu.edu.tw
text:
the file pkg-comment has a typo in it.

Fix: bugs@jaguar ~ > diff -u /usr/ports/misc/seizedesktop/pkg-comment pkg-comment
How-To-Repeat: bugs@jaguar ~ > cat /usr/ports/misc/seizedesktop/pkg-comment 
A customizer of disktop screen environment
                 ^
